product.name: Aramid D1 210
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkane tkaniny aramidowe serii D do odzieży trudnopalnej
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven D-series aramid fabrics for FR workwear
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 210 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 210 g/m², 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
descriptions: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 210 gr/m'2
210 g/m², 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 93% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1500N; Weft > 1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>70N ; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612
applicationImageLabels: Aramid Coveroll for Oil and Gas Industry
Aramid Arc Suit for Electrical Distribution

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit welding protection certification (EN ISO 11611) is directly stated as a technical parameter, confirming intended welding use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Application image label explicitly ties the fabric to electrical distribution arc suits, and EN 61482 arc-flash certification directly supports electrical/energy sector use.
Product description explicitly states use for wildland firefighters and is certified to EN ISO 15614 (Forest Firefighters), directly supporting firefighting application.
No explicit military, police or tactical use stated; only generic FR/industrial workwear context.

evidence: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
primary.rationale: The explicit Application field states 'Firefighters Costumes' and the description directly names wildland firefighters as an intended user group, supported by EN ISO 15614 forest-firefighter certification, making firefighting the most directly stated dominant end use.

evidence: Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
secondary.rationale: EN ISO 11611 welding protection is explicitly certified and named as a technical parameter, independently supporting a secondary welding/metalworking end use distinct from firefighting.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Arc-flash certification (EN 61482) and an 'Arc Suit for Electrical Distribution' image label support energy sector use, but this is secondary to the more directly named firefighting and welding applications; only one secondary slot is allowed.
Oil and gas coverall mention suggests general industrial workwear, but narrower named sectors (firefighting, welding) dominate the explicit evidence.
No explicit military, police or tactical use stated anywhere in the source data.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Fabric has multiple strongly certified end uses (firefighting, welding, energy/arc) and only one secondary application can be recorded, so human review is advisable to confirm the most commercially dominant pairing.
